payload.label: stove
payload.long_description: Close-up of a black enameled gas stove top with stainless-steel back control panel and digital display; four metal burner grates and front-mounted control knobs are visible, surface shows slight glare and mild compression artifacts; camera approximately 0.6 m from the stove.
